title: Robustly Roasted Moroccan Lamb Tagine
description: A light and herbal Moroccan dish featuring lamb and corn tortillas, roasted to perfection in a tagine, this recipe is a unique blend of flavors and textures, and is suitable for a Buddhist temple friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in the air fryer and sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the air fryer and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the quartered corn tortillas to the air fryer and cook for 2 minutes.
Transfer the lamb shoulder and corn tortillas to a tagine and roast in the oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
Let the tagine rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the robustly roasted Moroccan lamb tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs.
